def positive_django_raw_sql_in_loop():
    rule_id = "django_raw_sql_in_loop"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Django request or service code executes raw SQL inside loops instead of batching."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
